project_type: Expo React Native app (mobile + web) with TypeScript
test_framework: Playwright for E2E tests, tsc --noEmit for type checking, eslint for linting
build_command: npx expo export --platform web --output-dir dist-test 2>&1 || true
verification_instructions: Run npm run typecheck to confirm no TypeScript errors. Run npm run lint to confirm no lint errors.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed in node_modules. No additional setup needed.
environment_constraints: No device emulators available. Verification limited to typecheck and lint. No docker daemon.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT modify existing opencode-provider or opencode-related files. New tab must work independently of OpenCode connection state.
key_patterns: Tab screens in app/(tabs)/*.tsx. IconSymbol component uses SF Symbol names mapped to Material Icons in components/ui/icon-symbol.tsx. Colors from constants/theme.ts with light/dark palettes. React Native Paper for UI components. useColorScheme hook for theme detection. Providers in providers/ directory as context-based React providers.
directory_structure: app/(tabs)/ - file-based routing screens; providers/ - React context providers; lib/ - API clients and utilities; components/ - shared UI components; constants/ - theme and config; hooks/ - custom hooks
